body:
This PR renames all instances of `CLIMAParameters` to `ClimaParameters`
I am follwing this [guide](https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General?tab=readme-ov-file#how-do-i-rename-an-existing-registered-package) to rename and re-register the package.

Additional changes
- New minor version
- New UUID

Still todo after this PR gets merged
- Register the new package
- Change the repo URL and uppdate the URL in the [registry](https://github.com/JuliaRegistries/General/blob/master/C/CLIMAParameters/Package.toml) for the old repo. This should happen ASAP after this PR is merged.
title: Rename CLIMAParameters -> ClimaParameters
